title.label: Admin Dashboard Browser Title
title.help: The browser title displayed in admin dashboard pages. This appears in the browser tab and bookmarks.

pagination.label: Dashboard Table Pagination
pagination.help: The number of items to display per page in the dashboard table. Set the value to 0 to disable pagination. When set to 0, all items will be displayed on a single page.

confirmCountdown.label: Confirmation Countdown (seconds)
confirmCountdown.help: Destructive confirmation dialogs (delete, reset, etc.) disable the confirm button for this many seconds, forcing the user to pause and read the message. Set to 0 to disable the countdown.

accent.label: Dashboard Accent Color
accent.help: The accent color used throughout the admin dashboard.

keepIdOnDuplicate.label: Keep ID on Duplicate Object?
keepIdOnDuplicate.help: When enabled, duplicating an object will keep the original ID (user must change it manually before saving). When disabled (default), the ID field is cleared to allow autogen rules to work.
